fixture: Vulcan Mesa loaded, then temp .landroid with version 999 imported through File load confirmation

dialogsAfterAttempt.textSample: Import Failed×Import failed: Unsupported .landroid file version 999. This LANDroid build supports up to version 8.OK

notes: Smoke confirms future-version .landroid rejection is visible and non-destructive after the user enters the destructive-load confirmation.
The probe file was generated in /private/tmp from the W1 fixture by changing version to 999; no committed fixture was modified.
This smoke does not test every malformed package path, only version > LANDROID_FILE_VERSION rejection.
